text.title: Procurement Management Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Weights adjusted after bids opened to favour preferred vendor.
antipattern.fix: Freeze weights pre-bid; document and refuse changes.

antipattern.symptom: SOW has 'deliver to PM satisfaction' instead of criteria.
